nasb.text: She said, “According to your words, so be it.” So she sent them away, and they departed; and she tied the scarlet cord in the window.

esv.text: And she said, “According to your words, so be it.” Then she sent them away, and they departed. And she tied the scarlet cord in the window.

cnv.text: 那女人回答：“照你們的話，就這樣吧。”於是打發他們二人走了。他們走了以後，她就把朱紅色線繫在窗戶上。

ccb.text: 喇合答道：“一言为定！”于是她送走他们，把朱红色的绳子系在窗户上。
